selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 墙, 墙壁, 垣, 内壁, 分界物, 屏障；a. 墙的
words.definition: n. an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure

words.translation: n. 轻拍；v. 轻拍
words.definition: n. the sound made by a gentle blow

words.translation: n. 雄性动物, 雄猫
words.definition: n. (ethnic slur) offensive and derogatory name for a Black man who is abjectly servile and deferential to Whites

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 鸭子；vi. 没入水中, 闪避
words.definition: n. small wild or domesticated web-footed broad-billed swimming bird usually having a depressed body and short legs

words.translation: n. 衣服
words.definition: n clothing in general

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: n. 路, 道路, 公路, 途径, 方法
words.definition: n. an open way (generally public) for travel or transportation

words.translation: n. 服装, 覆盖物；vi. 穿着
words.definition: n. a one-piece garment for a woman; has skirt and bodice

words.translation: n. 深坑, 矿井, 果核, 地窖, 深渊, 绝境, 陷阱；vt. 窖藏, 使凹下, 使有麻点, 去...之核, 使留疤痕, 使相斗, 使竞争
words.definition: n. a sizeable hole (usually in the ground)

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: a. 几个的, 一些的, 各自的；pron. 几个
words.definition: s. (used with count nouns) of an indefinite number more than 2 or 3 but not many

words.translation: n. 步骤, 步, 步幅, 脚步声, 踏级, 步伐, 短距离, 步态, 手段, 等级；vt. 踏, 以步测量, 跨步, 使成阶梯状
words.definition: n. the act of changing location by raising the foot and setting it down

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: a. 干净的, 清白的, 简洁的；adv. 清洁地, 完全地
words.definition: v. make clean by removing dirt, filth, or unwanted substances from

words.translation: n. 跳跃, 跳动, 暴涨, 惊跳；vt. 跳跃, 跃过, 突升, 使跳跃
words.definition: n. a sudden and decisive increase

words.translation: n. 休息, 睡眠, 安息, 稍息, 静止, 支架, 休息处, 其余者, 剩余部分；vi. 休息, 睡, 长眠, 安心, 静止, 停止, 安置, 依赖
words.definition: n. freedom from activity (work or strain or responsibility)

words.translation: n. 茶, 茶叶
words.definition: n. a beverage made by steeping tea leaves in water

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: s. having the lower score or lagging position in a contest

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 前面, 开头, 前线, 阵线, 态度；vt. 面对, 朝向, 对抗
words.definition: n. the side that is forward or prominent

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地
words.definition: a. dispassionate;

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 最少, 最小, 最小限度；a. 最少的, 最小的
words.definition: n. something that is of no importance

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: prep. 自...以后, 自...以来；adv. 自那时以后

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: n. 走, 散步, 步行, 行走的路程, 竞走, 散步场所；vi. 走路, 步行, 处世

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的

words.translation: n. 罚款, 罚金, 晴天, 精细；a. 好的, 晴朗的, 健康的, 细小的, 精细的

words.translation: n. 帽子；vt. 给...戴帽子

words.translation: vi. 到达, 抵达
words.definition: v. reach a destination; arrive by movement or progress

words.translation: adv. 尤其, 特别, 格外
words.definition: r to a distinctly greater extent or degree than is common

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: n. 次序, 规则, 命令；vi. 命令, 定货
words.definition: n. (often plural) a command given by a superior (e.g., a military or law enforcement officer) that must be obeyed

words.translation: vt. 拉, 拖, 拔, 牵, 撕开, 吸引；vi. 拉, 拖, 拔, 有吸引力
words.definition: n. the act of pulling; applying force to move something toward or with you

words.translation: n. 预备好的状态, 现款；a. 准备好的, 备用的, 可以使用的
words.definition: n. poised for action

words.translation: a. 慢的, 缓慢的, 迟缓的, 迟钝的, 冷漠的, 落后的；adv. 慢地, 迟缓地

words.translation: a. 难过的, 悲哀的, 遗憾的

words.translation: a. 真实的, 正确的, 忠诚的, 可靠的, 纯粹的, 正式的；n. 真实, 准确

words.translation: n. 故事, 谎言, 谣言, 陈述, 叙述

words.translation: n. 破裂, 突发, 爆发；v. 爆裂, 突发, 充满

words.translation: n. 胸, 胸部, 衣柜, 箱子

words.translation: v. 攀登, 上升, 爬；n. 攀登, 爬升
words.definition: n. an event that involves rising to a higher point (as in altitude or temperature or intensity etc.)

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的

words.translation: a. 肮脏的, 卑鄙的；vt. 弄脏

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面

words.translation: n. 路径, 小路, 道路, 途径, 路线, 轨道

words.translation: n. 便士, 一分, 小钱, 点滴

words.translation: n. 日落, 同伙, 组合, 集合, 装置；vt. 放, 安置, 放置, 设定, 使凝结, 点燃, 确定, 点缀, 使就位, 树立, 分配, 调整

words.translation: n. 洗, 洗涤, 冲洗, 洗的衣服, 冲积物, 洼地；vt. 洗, 洗涤, 洗清, 用水冲洗, 流过, 弄湿, 粉刷, 镀金属薄层于

words.translation: pl. 裤子, 长裤
